title: dianthus knappii
intro: Dianthus knappii, also known as the Tibetan pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Tibetan medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues. The medicinal properties of Dianthus knappii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Dianthus knappii can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is also used in traditional Tibetan medicine as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
